author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Capstone: zero the SDK import-boundary baseline (91 entries) — flip remaining CLI/MCP private-core imports to SDK primitives and harden the ratchet into a hard boundary gate

pm-8778 shipped the ratchet gate; scripts/release/sdk-import-boundary-baseline.json currently allows 91 private src/core imports from src/cli + src/mcp. Each SDK promotion item (pm-rjqr/98cz/zwpp/je50/4a7m/3mna/oxrw/oslr) flips its own domain's CLI handlers, but no child owns the terminal state: (1) residual imports not covered by any single domain promotion, (2) the MCP-layer flip — promotion ACs name CLI handlers only while the epic AC requires src/mcp to shrink to SDK-only too, (3) emptying + deleting the baseline file, (4) flipping static-quality-gate from ratchet mode to unconditional hard-deny so the boundary can never regress. Duplicate check 2026-07-06: pm-8778 (closed) built the gate mechanism; the 8 promotion items shrink the baseline domain-by-domain; searched 'boundary ratchet zero sdk-only imports capstone' — no existing item owns baseline-to-zero + gate hardening.

sdk-import-boundary-baseline.json reaches zero entries and is deleted; static-quality-gate hard-denies any private src/core import from src/cli/** and src/mcp/** with no baseline escape hatch; src/mcp handlers consume only src/sdk primitives; full test suite + 100% coverage gate green with zero CLI/MCP behavior change

message: Audit #10 2026-07-06: gap found while mapping pm-usfg children to the epic AC — nothing owned the terminal boundary flip.

The repository-wide boundary baseline is not yet zero, so this capstone returns to open for the remaining command families.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Boundary burn-down is strongest when the implementation itself moves to an SDK-owned module; deleting a baseline block without changing ownership would only hide the dependency direction.

patch.value: Exact all-source coverage after extension SDK promotion

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Review-driven implementation evidence 2026-07-15: promoted the complete extension lifecycle engine and cohesive helpers from src/cli/commands/extension* into src/sdk/extension*, kept only thin CLI compatibility re-exports, and made SDK runtime/init consume the SDK implementation directly. This removed 45 additional grandfathered private-core edges: static quality reports actual_edge_count=597, baseline_edge_count=597, zero new/stale/dynamic violations. Suppression pruning reduced the mandatory budget 170 -> 167. Final all-source verification passes 291 files / 5,713 tests at exact 100%: 36,940 statements, 26,521 branches, 7,450 functions, 36,055 lines. The capstone remains incomplete because 597 edges remain, so it is returning to open.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Second-head CodeQL evidence: accepted the polynomial-regex finding introduced by relocating the extension helper into the PR diff. Replaced the overlapping anchored alternation with two linear anchored trims and added a 20,004-character adversarial hyphen-run regression. Focused extension tests pass 125/125; strict lint/static quality pass; final all-source coverage remains exact 100/100/100/100 across 5,713 tests. Thread reacted to, replied inline, and resolved.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Third-head review evidence: replaced per-destination extension install locking with one scope-wide transaction lock carrying a UUID owner token; stale and final cleanup re-read ownership before removal, and regressions prove cross-destination serialization, invalid/stale-owner refusal, replacement-owner preservation, and owner-write cleanup. Install activation now requires explicit runtime status ok. Executable aliases moved into SDK contracts so SDK scaffolding has no reverse CLI dependency. Directory normalization uses linear index scans, eliminating both CodeQL regex findings. Focused extension/bootstrap tests pass 216/216; repository verification passes 291 files / 5,717 tests at exact 100%: 36,962 statements, 26,531 branches, 7,453 functions, 36,077 lines. Typecheck, lint, duplicates, static/docstring/package/token gates pass; suppression budget improved 167 -> 166. Temp-directory package-first dogfood passed 88 real CLI/SDK/package commands.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Shared extension managed-state and settings mutations require scope-level serialization; destination-level locks protect copies but cannot protect shared snapshots. Persisted unique ownership must be re-read before stale reclaim and final release so an earlier installer cannot delete a replacement lock.
